transcript: Speaker A: Go ahead, laugh now. Laugh at my English all you want. It's been only fifteen days since I started using this app. Now I can speak English better than you guys. Speaker B: Just fifteen days? Wow, your English is so fluent. Speaker C: ಯಾವ್ ಆಪ್ ಅದು? [Which app is that?] Speaker A: ಇದು SpeakX app. ಇದು AI powered English learning app. ಇದು ನಮ್ಮ English ಅನ್ನ improve ಮಾಡೋಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ help ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ. ನೀವೆಲ್ಲರೂ time waste ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದಾಗ ನಾನು ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ten to fifteen minutes ಈ app ಅಲ್ಲಿ English practice ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೆ. ಇದು ಒಂದು AI teacher. ನಾನು ತಪ್ಪಾಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡಿದಾಗ ಇದು ನನ್ನ correct ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ. ಇನ್ನು ನಾನು ಹೆದರಲ್ಲ. ಯಾವುದೇ ತಪ್ಪು ಮಾಡಿದ್ರು AI teacher ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇದೆ. ನಾನು mistake ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ correct ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ನನಗೆ ಕಲಿಯೋಕೆ help ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ. ಬನ್ನಿ ಈ app ನೋಡಿ try ಮಾಡಿ. [This is SpeakX app. This is an AI-powered English learning app. This helps a lot in improving our English. While you all were wasting time, I practiced English on this app for ten to fifteen minutes every day. This is an AI teacher. When I speak incorrectly, it corrects me. Now I am not afraid. Whatever mistake I make, the AI teacher is with me. If I make a mistake, it corrects me and helps me learn. Come, try this app.] Speaker B: Hello ma'am, ನನಗೆ English ಕಲಿಯೋಕೆ help ಮಾಡ್ತೀರಾ? [Hello ma'am, will you help me learn English?] Speaker D: Sure. ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ನೀವು ನಿಮ್ಮ free time ನಲ್ಲಿ spoken English practice ಮಾಡಲು start ಮಾಡಿ. ಕಾವ್ಯ ತರ ನೀವು ಕೂಡ ಹದಿನೈದು ಇಪ್ಪತ್ತು ದಿನಗಳಲ್ಲಿ English fluent ಆಗಿ ಮಾತನಾಡಬಹುದು. [Sure. Start practicing spoken English with me in your free time. Like Kavya, you too can speak English fluently in fifteen to twenty days.] Speaker B: Wow, ಈ AI teacher ತುಂಬಾ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿದೆ. ನಾನು ಕಾವ್ಯ ತರ English ಕಲಿಬೇಕು. [Wow, this AI teacher is very good. I want to learn English like Kavya.] Speaker A: ಈ app ನನ್ನ life change ಮಾಡಿದೆ. ಈಗ ಎಲ್ಲರೂ ನನಗೆ respect ಕೊಡ್ತಾರೆ. ನೀವು ಕೂಡ SpeakX app download ಮಾಡಿ. [This app changed my life. Now everyone respects me. You too download the SpeakX app.]

Wow your English is so fluent. ಯಾವ್ ಆಪ್ ಅದು? [Whatever mistake I make, the AI teacher is with me.] ನಾನು mistake ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ correct ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ ಮತ್ತೆ ನನಗೆ ಕಲಿಯೋಕೆ help ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ, [If I make a mistake, it corrects and helps me learn,] ಬನ್ನಿ ಈ app ನೋಡಿ try ಮಾಡಿ. [Hello ma'am, will you help me learn English?] Sure. ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ನೀವು ನಿಮ್ಮ free time ನಲ್ಲಿ spoken English practice ಮಾಡಲು start ಮಾಡಿ. [Start practicing spoken English with me in your free time.] ಕಾವ್ಯ ತರ ನೀವು ಕೂಡ ಹದಿನೈದು ಇಪ್ಪತ್ತು ದಿನಗಳಲ್ಲಿ English fluent ಆಗಿ ಮಾತನಾಡಬಹುದು. [Like Kavya, you too can speak English fluently in 15-20 days.] Wow ಈ AI teacher ತುಂಬಾ ಚೆನ್ನಾಗಿದೆ. ನಾನು ಕಾವ್ಯ ತರ English ಕಲಿಬೇಕು. [Wow, this AI teacher is very good. I want to learn English like Kavya.] ಈ app ನನ್ನ life change ಮಾಡಿದೆ. ಈಗ ಎಲ್ಲರೂ ನನಗೆ respect ಕೊಡ್ತಾರೆ. [This app changed my life. Now everyone respects me.] ನೀವು ಕೂಡ SpeakX app ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ. [You too download the SpeakX app.]
summary: A woman surprises her friends with her newly fluent English, explaining she learned it in just 15 days using the SpeakX app. She demonstrates how the app's AI teacher corrects her mistakes in real-time, prompting her friends to download it too. The ad encourages viewers to download SpeakX to practice spoken English and gain confidence.
